meta.title: Sebastian Cachis — Full Stack Developer
meta.description: Full Stack Developer specialized in Next.js, Spring Boot, and scalable software architecture.

hero.name: Sebastian Cachis
hero.tagline: I build financial platforms with architecture ready to scale.
hero.metric: 97.5% reduction in regulatory processes at Alfin Banco.

about.heading: Product-minded software engineering and architecture built to scale.
body: I'm a Junior Full Stack Developer focused on software architecture (DDD, CQRS, microservices, event-driven) with hands-on experience in the financial sector across Grupo Coril, Alfin Banco, and ecomserv.

Day to day I combine Java/Spring Boot with Next.js to build platforms that must be reliable, traceable, and auditable. I'm especially interested in the balance between long-term technical decisions and continuous delivery that moves the business.
I'm pursuing a Software Engineering degree at UPC, ranked in the top 10%, and hold a C1 English level. Based in Lima, Peru.

experience.heading: Experience
experience.intro: Four years shipping product in fintech, from Java support work to leading a Multi-Family Office platform.

projects.heading: Projects
projects.intro: A selection of recent fintech work. Some cases are under NDA and are presented at a narrative level.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.intro: A project, an opportunity, or a technical conversation? Drop me a line.
